novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: RichardsonRobins2010 already gives fixed-defier/global ACE geometry and SachsJonzonSjolanderGabriel2023/DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 give generic symbolic/automated sharp-bound machinery, so the hand-eliminated two-cap strict-shrinkage frontier is a useful specialization rather than a flagship regime-opening result.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: To pursue flagship tier, pivot from a static two-cap catalogue to a strict extension explicitly left open by prior work, such as covariate-assisted two-cap IV bounds with an active-facet inference theory extending LevisBonviniZengKeeleKennedy2025.

If retaining the current kernel, add a precise comparison to RichardsonRobins2010 Section 5/Table 4 showing exactly which fixed-defier/global ACE formulas are reused and which never-taker-cap facets are genuinely new.
Promote the nondegenerate strict-shrinkage witness into a named corollary with the active inequalities and primal latent law, so Stage 0 can audit nontriviality immediately.

recommended_next_step: Do not advance this as a flagship target; either lower the target to field or pivot to a broader published-open extension.
